rubric.en:
**G1** (5p): Arranging the code in headers and cpp files accordingly.
**G2** (4p): Writing the abstract Visitor and Product classes (2 points each).
**G3** (3p): Writing the PriceVisitor class.
**G4** (5p): Writing the DetailsVisitor class.
**G5** (3p): Writing the Book class.
**G6** (3p): Writing the Pen class.
**G7** (2p): Writing the Author class.
rubric.ro:
**G1** (5p): Aranjarea codului in headere si fisiere cpp corespunzatoare.
**G2** (4p): Scrierea claselor abstracte Visitor si Product (cate 2 pct pentru fiecare).
**G3** (3p): Scrierea clasei PriceVisitor.
**G4** (5p): Scrierea clasei DetailsVisitor.
**G5** (3p): Scrierea clasei Book.
**G6** (3p): Scrierea clasei Pen.
**G7** (2p): Scrierea clasei Author.
